name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech at Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (2023 – Present); Class XII at Govt. Boys Senior Secondary School (2023)

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a hybrid CNN–LSTM with attention model achieving 97% accuracy for EEG-based schizophrenia detection. Utilized bandpass filtering and temporal windowing for robust feature extraction and improved interpretability with Grad-CAM, Integrated Gradients, and attention weight visualization.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Built a secure chatbot access system using real-time face recognition with OpenCV, integrating facial authentication with conversational AI for personalized interaction and ensuring high-accuracy face matching.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a voice-controlled terminal for executing complex shell operations via natural language. Integrated Google’s generative AI models for intelligent command understanding and published it as a PyPI package.
